title: achillea ageratifolia subsp. aizoon
intro: Achillea ageratifolia subsp. aizoon, also known as Aizoon, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Aizoon can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
